message:
refactor(animations): use useSyncExternalStore for reduced motion

Replace useState+useEffect pattern with useSyncExternalStore for
media query subscription. This is the React 18+ recommended pattern
and prevents hydration mismatches for SSR.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
